Detected via the CENTRAL tier table, NOT a per-variant `=== \"COMPLETE\" || === \"ERROR\"` check — so terminal routing stays driven by the one const table (feedback_use_tier_for_signal_routing); discriminate COMPLETE vs ERROR within the tier by the message type only where the handling actually differs."

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

A TERMINAL message = tier 5 (COMPLETE | ERROR), R-tier / D34. Detected via the CENTRAL tier
table, NOT a per-variant `=== "COMPLETE" || === "ERROR"` check — so terminal routing stays
driven by the one const table (feedback_use_tier_for_signal_routing); discriminate COMPLETE vs
ERROR within the tier by the message type only where the handling actually differs.

## Import

```ts
import { isTerminal } from "@graphrefly/ts/core";
```

## Signature

```ts
function isTerminal(t: MessageType): boolean
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `t` | `MessageType` | t value used by the helper. |

## Returns

`true` when the value matches the expected shape.

## Example

```ts
import { isTerminal } from "@graphrefly/ts/core";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/protocol/messages.ts`
